nasb.text: The Lord will establish you as a holy people to Himself, as He swore to you, if you keep the commandments of the Lord your God and walk in His ways.

esv.text: The Lord will establish you as a people holy to himself, as he has sworn to you, if you keep the commandments of the Lord your God and walk in his ways.

cnv.text: 如果你謹守耶和華你的　神的誡命，遵守他的道路，耶和華就必照著他向你起過的誓，立你作他自己的聖民。

ccb.text: “你们若遵守你们上帝耶和华的诫命，遵行祂的旨意，祂必按自己的誓言使你们成为祂圣洁的子民。
